ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the prize was awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the prize (e.g., Chemistry, Literature, Medicine, Peace, Physics) */,
  "prize_name" TEXT /* Full name of the prize */,
  "motivation" TEXT /* Motivation for awarding the prize */,
  "prize_share" TEXT /* Prize share (e.g., 1/1, 1/2) */,
  "prize_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prize */,
  "prize_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the prize */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prize entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prize entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureates" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize the laureate received */,
  "laureate_type" TEXT /* Type of the laureate (e.g., Individual, Organization) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the laureate */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the laureate */,
  "birth_city" TEXT /* City where the laureate was born */,
  "birth_country" TEXT /* Country where the laureate was born */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the laureate */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the laureate */,
  "death_city" TEXT /* City where the laureate died */,
  "death_country" TEXT /* Country where the laureate died */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the laureate */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the laureate */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Current nationality of the laureate */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study or expertise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the laureate entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the laureate entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureates_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate affiliated with the organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "organization_country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "organization_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the organization's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the organization entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the organization entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the prize data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)
